=== SECTION: CHARGE ===

R v Zara Holt

Statement of Offence:
Being concerned in the supply of a controlled drug of Class A, namely cocaine, contrary to section 4(2)(b) of the Misuse of Drugs Act 1971.

Particulars of Offence:
Between 1 November 2025 and 28 February 2026 were concerned in the supply of cocaine to others.

Encro-style message extracts are served. Handle SILVER-44 appears in thread. Mapping of handle/phone to Zara Holt is not proved on current papers. Platform extraction, attribution report, subscriber data, and device continuity are outstanding.
